description: Style NoteThis kurti from aurelia embodies a relaxed aesthetic that incorporates subtly ethnic design details. Balance the sober patterns with a bright colour pop denims or an intricate stole. We recommend ethnic flats in metallic tones for your feet.Product DetailsBlack kurti, has red print, red paneling on the yoke, round neck and a short buttoned placket, three quarter sleeves and side slitsMaterial and Care100% cotton Wash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
